## Summary

<!-- What Kubernetes/GitOps change does this PR make? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New Argo CD Application
- [ ] Manifest update (deployment, job, cronjob)
- [ ] Helm values change
- [ ] RBAC / ServiceAccount change
- [ ] OPA policy update
- [ ] Documentation

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials in any manifest
- [ ] Vault path references used (not hardcoded values)
- [ ] Image tags are pinned (no `latest`)
- [ ] RBAC follows least-privilege
- [ ] No `hostNetwork: true` or `privileged: true` without justification

## Tested On

- [ ] Local kind cluster (Argo CD synced successfully)
